'''washozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:miascite|miascite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:miascite|miascite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| washozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæshezeth|wæshezeth]] || [[word:wæshezej|wæshezej]] || [[word:wæshezesh|wæshezesh]] || [[word:wæsheze|wæsheze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:washoshozoth|washoshozoth]] || [[word:washoshozoj|washoshozoj]] || [[word:washoshozosh|washoshozosh]] || [[word:washoshozo|washoshozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:washozoth|washozoth]] || [[word:washozoj|washozoj]] || [[word:washozosh|washozosh]] || [[word:washozo|washozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:washofzofth|washofzofth]] || [[word:washofzofj|washofzofj]] || [[word:washofzofsh|washofzofsh]] || [[word:washofzof|washofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:washozotho|washozotho]] || [[word:washozojo|washozojo]] || [[word:washozosho|washozosho]] || [[word:washozoko|washozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:washozoth|washozoth]] || [[word:washozoj|washozoj]] || [[word:washozosh|washozosh]] || [[word:washozo|washozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:washozothol|washozothol]] || [[word:washozojol|washozojol]] || [[word:washozoshol|washozoshol]] || [[word:washozokol|washozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:washozoothotho|washozoothotho]] || [[word:washozoojojo|washozoojojo]] || [[word:washozooshosho|washozooshosho]] || [[word:washozooko|washozooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:washozothon|washozothon]] || [[word:washozojon|washozojon]] || [[word:washozoshon|washozoshon]] || [[word:washozokon|washozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:washozothooro|washozothooro]] || [[word:washozojooro|washozojooro]] || [[word:washozoshooro|washozoshooro]] || [[word:washozokooro|washozokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|34122d8}}
